title: Cloud Native Security Policy v1.0
content:
metadata:
  type: Policy
  title: Cloud Native Security Policy v1.0
  version: 1.0.0
  gemara-version: 1.0.0
  description: >-
    Baseline cloud native security policy covering container image
    provenance, runtime configuration, network segmentation, RBAC,
    and secrets management.

criteria:
  - id: CNS-01
    title: Container Image Provenance
    description: All container images must be signed and traced to a trusted build pipeline.
    catalog-ref: cloud-native-controls/IMG-001
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: CNS-01.1
        description: Verify image signatures using cosign or notation.
        frequency: daily
      - id: CNS-01.2
        description: Verify SBOM attestation exists for each image.
        frequency: weekly

  - id: CNS-02
    title: Runtime Security Configuration
    description: Containers must run as non-root with read-only root filesystems.
    catalog-ref: cloud-native-controls/RUN-001
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: CNS-02.1
        description: Verify securityContext enforces non-root.
        frequency: daily
      - id: CNS-02.2
        description: Verify readOnlyRootFilesystem is set.
        frequency: daily

  - id: CNS-03
    title: Network Segmentation
    description: All namespaces must have NetworkPolicies restricting ingress and egress.
    catalog-ref: cloud-native-controls/NET-001
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: CNS-03.1
        description: Verify default-deny NetworkPolicy exists per namespace.
        frequency: weekly
      - id: CNS-03.2
        description: Verify no pods bypass network policies via hostNetwork.
        frequency: daily

  - id: CNS-04
    title: RBAC Least Privilege
    description: Service accounts must follow least-privilege with no cluster-admin bindings.
    catalog-ref: cloud-native-controls/IAM-001
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: CNS-04.1
        description: Audit ClusterRoleBindings for cluster-admin usage.
        frequency: weekly
      - id: CNS-04.2
        description: Verify no default service account tokens are auto-mounted.
        frequency: daily

  - id: CNS-05
    title: Secrets Management
    description: Sensitive data must be stored in sealed secrets or external vaults, not plain ConfigMaps.
    catalog-ref: cloud-native-controls/SEC-001
    assessment-requirements:
      - id: CNS-05.1
        description: Scan for plain-text secrets in ConfigMaps and environment variables.
        frequency: daily
      - id: CNS-05.2
        description: Verify external secrets operator is configured for production namespaces.
        frequency: weekly

adherence:
  assessment-plans:
    - id: continuous
      frequency: daily
      description: Automated daily scans via complyctl
    - id: weekly-review
      frequency: weekly
      description: Weekly manual review of RBAC and network policies
